top_signals.title: AEP's McCulloch on Australia’s Energy Path Forward
top_signals.summary: Australian Energy Producers CEO Samantha McCulloch addresses the pressing challenges facing Australia’s energy sector. She speaks with Paul Allen from the sidelines of 'Australian Energy Producers Conference & Exhibition 2026' in Adelaide. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

alerts.title: AEP's McCulloch on Australia’s Energy Path Forward
